---
title: "Licesing Open-Source Software in Coding Agent Era"
draft: true
---

Coding agents capabilties can rewrite an entire open-source package
it is becoming more and more difficult to navigate open-source in this environment

one option is probably to rethink licensing and think of a future

open-source tech company can protect themself from complete rewrite of their code
through closed source tst suite to prevent free rider
best test suite => well documented => robust user experience and bug bounty hunter
